summary.interpretation_note: Replacement candidates were intentionally reviewed after expansion16 produced five visual FAIL pairs. PASS/WARN pairs may be used as stress candidates; FAIL is excluded from scoring manifests.

pairs.visible_evidence: Cup is centered and identifiable in both A and B; rim and cylindrical body visible. A has low red-on-red contrast; B has strong black/white material streaking.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Usable for grounding, but material/table differences and B texture artifacts reduce clean A/B comparability. Retake on neutral surface if material fidelity matters.

pairs.visible_evidence: Cup is clearly visible in both views with handle and rim apparent. Framing is close and useful.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: B shows smeared/blotchy black-white material and A/B surface colors differ; comparison is usable but visually uneven.

pairs.visible_evidence: Cup body and rim are visible in both; handle is partly hidden at the far side but still inferable.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: A has glare and low red-on-red separation; B handle is mostly obscured and material appears vertically streaked. Retake with a clearer side angle if handle identity is important.

pairs.visible_evidence: Cup is large, centered, identifiable, and the handle/rim/body are visible in both A and B. Framing is useful and views are comparable.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Minor material differences and B texture streaking, but not enough to block grounding or pair comparison.

pairs.visible_evidence: Both A and B show a mug/cup with handle in close, centered framing.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Material/color differs strongly between A and B; B has smeared/patchy surface artifacts. Usable, but caveated.

pairs.visible_evidence: Small cups are visible on a tray/tea set in both A and B, with similar camera framing.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Cups are small and partly secondary to the teapot/tray; strong material shifts reduce clean grounding.

pairs.visible_evidence: Three small cups are visible on the tray in both A and B; pair viewpoint is broadly comparable.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Target cups are tiny relative to scene and low-detail; A has heavy red material wash, B has harsh black/white contrast.

pairs.visible_evidence: Small cups are visible on the tray in both renders, with similar oblique framing.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Cups are identifiable but small; material/lighting differences are severe and could distract VLM grounding.

pairs.visible_evidence: Both A and B show a central lidded teapot/incense-like object on a tray; no clearly identifiable cup is visible.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Retake with the cup target in frame and recognizable by rim/bowl shape, not hidden by or confused with the larger vessel.

pairs.visible_evidence: Three small cups are visible on the tray in both A and B; B has good contrast, while A's red cups blend into the red table/tray.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Usable, but A is low-contrast for grounding. Retake with less monochrome material or closer framing on the cups.

pairs.visible_evidence: Three small cups are visible on the tray in both A and B, with comparable angle and layout; A again has weak red-on-red separation.
pairs.main_risk_or_retake: Usable with caveat: A's cup boundaries are somewhat washed into the table/tray. Retake with stronger contrast if precise VLM grounding is needed.
